acceptance_targets: [ch08-craft-001] PASS if the revised line at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:287 identifies Gabriel with a healed left collarbone break and a missing upper-left premolar, with no conflicting right-side or alternate premolar wording remaining. FAIL if the line still points to the upper right or any other contradictory dental marker.

[ch08-craft-002] PASS if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:289-295 makes Della's choice legible through specific consequences and behavior, and the beat contains no explicit self-judging shorthand such as "coward," "wrong," or equivalent authorial reassurance. FAIL if the scene still resolves the discomfort by naming her guilt instead of dramatizing the withholding.

[ch08-prose-001] PASS if, after revision, at least two of the cited turns no longer rely on a bare "Della looked..." or repeated "She thought of..." formula and instead shift the scene through distinct physical or interpretive detail tied to those exact spans. FAIL if the revised passage still contains three or more of the same sight/thought pivot shapes across the cited lines.

[FBR-002] Pass if the ledger line at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3204 specifies the upper left premolar and no right-side dental description remains anywhere in chapter_08. Fail if the ledger still says upper right or if the identifier is softened into vagueness that no longer supports the later identification sequence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised line at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:287 identifies Gabriel with a healed left collarbone break and a missing upper-left premolar, with no conflicting right-side or alternate premolar wording remaining. FAIL if the line still points to the upper right or any other contradictory dental marker.
findings.problem: Gabriel's identifying dental detail contradicts canon. The continuity sheet establishes a missing upper-left premolar, but the chapter records "second premolar gone upper right." Because Gabriel's later identification depends on these body markers, this is a high-stakes continuity break, not a cosmetic slip.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:287, align Gabriel's identifying markers with canon: keep the healed left collarbone break and revise the tooth note to the established upper-left premolar detail. If Della would record the feature in more exact language, make it exact there rather than introducing a right-side variant.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:289-295 makes Della's choice legible through specific consequences and behavior, and the beat contains no explicit self-judging shorthand such as "coward," "wrong," or equivalent authorial reassurance. FAIL if the scene still resolves the discomfort by naming her guilt instead of dramatizing the withholding.
findings.problem: The chapter reaches its hardest moral choice when Della withholds Gabriel's page, then cushions that choice with an immediate self-verdict ("Coward"). That is a moral safety valve: the prose tells the reader Della knows she is failing instead of letting the reader sit inside the selfish, practical, blood-and-land logic of the withholding.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the decision beat across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:289-295 so Della's refusal to copy Gabriel is rendered through concrete stakes and bodily behavior rather than abstract self-condemnation. Keep the focus on what leaving Gabriel out protects or endangers for Rafe, the land claim, and the house; then land the beat on a physical action with the pen, page, or oilcloth instead of the label at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:295.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, after revision, at least two of the cited turns no longer rely on a bare "Della looked..." or repeated "She thought of..." formula and instead shift the scene through distinct physical or interpretive detail tied to those exact spans. FAIL if the revised passage still contains three or more of the same sight/thought pivot shapes across the cited lines.
findings.problem: Several scene turns default to the same pivot construction: isolated "Della looked..." beats and a serial "She thought of..." chain. Reusing the same sight/thought hinge in key transitions makes the prose feel mechanically spliced instead of freshly perceived.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:139, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:181, recast at least two of these pivots away from bare looking/thinking clauses. Use Della's stronger house-body sensory repertoire instead: thumb stiffness, chair complaint, heat, lamp hiss, or the pressure of being cornered.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the ledger line at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3204 specifies the upper left premolar and no right-side dental description remains anywhere in chapter_08. Fail if the ledger still says upper right or if the identifier is softened into vagueness that no longer supports the later identification sequence.
findings.problem: Della's own ledger entry records Gabriel as having the "second premolar gone upper right," which contradicts both the continuity sheet and the later grave opening, where the missing upper left premolar is treated as authoritative evidence. This is more damaging than a stray dialogue slip because it makes the manuscript's supposedly definitive written source internally wrong.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the ledger excerpt at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3202-3210 so Gabriel's page records the missing upper left premolar while preserving the rest of the entry's function. The line should match the later proof language rather than force the reader to decide whether the notebook or the exhumation is the true canon.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally compromised caretaking, the bureaucratic brutality of naming, and the physical labor of moving the dead. When an edge case appears, prefer the detail a witness would remember over the phrasing a polite narrator would use. Let tenderness exist inside harsh material without cleaning the harshness off.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If childbirth, exhumation, poverty, sexual history, bodily decay, or violence enters a scene, render it through specific sensation and consequence; summarizing away the hard fact counts as a failed pass, not tasteful restraint.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High overall; contractions are the norm across dialogue, with fuller forms reserved for class performance, legal formality, deliberate emphasis, or a character trying not to lose composure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public labor chapters with quieter domestic or inventory chapters, vary scene count and dialogue density, let some chapters turn on information or paperwork rather than confrontation, and ensure no two consecutive chapters share the same dominant mechanism, pace, or emotional temperature.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken historical Appalachian-Southern English without caricature; concrete, unsentimental, regionally grounded, and alert to how legal language clashes with lived speech.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Della Bledsoe, intimate enough to track bodily memory and evasive thought while never slipping into other characters' interior monologue as fact
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular work-sentence compression with longer accumulating sentences that carry memory, atmosphere, and moral weight; let cadence tighten in hearings and exhumations, then widen in domestic or reflective passages.
